added: GitHub wiki starter set - added a publish-ready wiki content pack covering setup, download workflow, playback, troubleshooting, updates, architecture, development, and policy pages
fixed: Non-YouTube analysis timeout recovery - slower sites now get safe extended-timeout retries during link analysis without restoring the old insecure certificate-bypass fallback
yt-dlp runtime updater flow - the app now routes yt-dlp updates through the downloader's own self-update path instead of manually replacing the embedded runtime file
Audio extraction merge flags - audio-only downloads no longer pass invalid yt-dlp merge-output arguments like m4a
Audio-only source classification - links that only expose audio containers now stay under Audio only instead of being mislabeled as Video + audio
Site compatibility regressions after v1.7.2.0 - restored newer extractor/runtime recovery behavior for pages that had started failing or exposing fewer formats
Postprocessing recovery loops - optional yt-dlp postprocessing failures now salvage already-finished media more reliably
VP9/WebM merge behavior - VP9 plus Opus downloads now resolve straight to webm when appropriate
History trace visibility - restored sanitized per-task debug traces in Download History
Recovered thumbnail sidecars - recovery paths no longer export stray thumbnail .webp files into public Downloads
In-app video playback handoff - opening a video now pauses background audio playback from the app, and the center play/pause overlay is visually centered again
Android chooser overmatching - the app no longer advertises itself for unrelated browser and file-open targets
improved: Auto container defaults - single-file video downloads now default to Auto container resolution
Explicit MP4 safety filtering - choosing mp4 now prefers MP4-safe video-plus-audio combinations
Container-routing polish - YouTube merge routing now chooses cleaner final targets for AVC1, AV1, and VP9/Opus selections
README presentation refresh - reorganized the repository landing page into a more visual release overview
Preview gallery consistency - README and wiki screenshot galleries now use a more stable two-column rhythm
Nightly publishing control - standard CI runs now keep building APK artifacts without auto-publishing GitHub nightly prereleases
